mapper.select: SELECT place_id, place_type, name, address, view_count, latitude, longitude, image_url, updated_at FROM PLACE WHERE place_id = #{place_id}
SELECT accommodation_id, description, TRIM(phone) AS phone, category, status, price, TRIM(areaCode) AS areaCode FROM ACCOMMODATION WHERE accommodation_id = #{place_id}
mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, image_url = #{image_url}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE place_id = #{place_id}
UPDATE ACCOMMODATION SET description = #{description}, phone = #{phone}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, areaCode = #{areaCode} WHERE accommodation_id = #{accommodation_id}

MERGE INTO PLACE p USING DUAL ON (p.place_id = #{place_id}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, latitude = #{latitude, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, longitude = #{longitude, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, image_url = #{image_url, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (place_id, place_type, name, address, view_count, latitude, longitude, image_url, created_at) VALUES (#{place_id}, 'ACC', #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{latitude, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{longitude, jdbcType=DOUBLE}, #{image_url, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSTIMESTAMP)

MERGE INTO ACCOMMODATION a USING DUAL ON (a.accommodation_id = #{accommodation_id}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET description = #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, category = #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price, jdbcType=INTEGER}, areaCode = #{areaCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (accommodation_id, description, phone, category, status, price, areaCode) VALUES (#{accommodation_id}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{category, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'OPEN', #{price, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{areaCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
